mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_favorite (announce_id, member_id, created_at) VALUES (#{announceId}, #{memberId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT a.announce_id AS announceId, a.announce_title AS announceTitle, a.link AS link FROM member_favorite mf JOIN announce a ON mf.announce_id = a.announce_id WHERE mf.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY mf.created_at DESC
